fullText:
Gold Rush (Japanese: ゴールドラッシュ) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Kijima Kogen in Beppu, Ōita, Japan. The opening date of the coaster is currently unknown.



Beige track and supports.

The train is designed to resemble mine cars.


 * Gold Rush on the parks website (Japanese)
